message:
Dear {{ doc.visitor_full_name }},

Your visit has been APPROVED.

Visit Details

Date{{ doc.visit_date }}
Time{{ doc.expected_checkin }} - {{ doc.expected_checkout }}
Host{{ doc.person_to_visit }}
Purpose{{ doc.purpose_of_visit }}
Pass ID{{ doc.name }}

Your Gate Pass (QR Code)

{% if doc.qr_code_image %}
Show this code at the security gate. You can also save this email or take a screenshot.
{% else %}

Your QR pass is being generated and will be sent in a follow-up email shortly.

{% endif %}

On Arrival

  • Please carry a valid photo ID matching the one you registered with.
  • Show the QR code above at the gate for verification.
  • Your physical badge will be issued at the security desk after item verification.
    • {% if doc.visitor_type == 'Contractor' %}
  • Ensure you have completed the required safety induction and are wearing provided PPE.
    • {% endif %}

We look forward to welcoming you.

This is an automated email. Please contact your host for any changes or queries.
name: VMS Approval Email
subject: Visit Approved: {{ doc.visit_date }} — Pass {{ doc.name }}
